dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Software Bill of Materials — Governance Overview
dashboard.description: SeeBOM autonomously ingests SPDX SBOMs from the CNCF ecosystem, cross-references known vulnerabilities via the OSV database, evaluates license compliance against a configurable policy, and applies OpenVEX statements to suppress non-applicable findings — giving you a single pane of glass for software supply-chain governance.
dashboard.disclaimer: Disclaimer: The data shown on this dashboard is provided on an "as-is" basis for informational purposes only. Vulnerability and license information is sourced from third-party databases (OSV, GitHub) and may be incomplete or delayed. SeeBOM does not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of any data and is not a substitute for professional security audits or legal advice. Use at your own risk.
